zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis de BRIENNE於大約1220年出生在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا時，他的父親King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I53歲，母親Berenguela de León17歲。他於1253年2月12日與Agnès de BEAUMONT在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年9月1日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特波奧蒙吉素-薩特享年78歲，埋葬在法國阿奎泰吉洛德麥布頌。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis de BRIENNE于大约1220年出生在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا时，他的父亲King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I53岁，母亲Berenguela de León17岁。他于1253年2月12日与Agnès de BEAUMONT在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年9月1日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特波奧蒙吉素-薩特享年78岁，埋葬在法国阿奎泰吉洛德麥布頌。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis de BRIENNE was born about 1220, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, his father, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, was 53 and his mother, Berenguela de León, was 17. He married Agnès de BEAUMONT on 12 February 1253, in Acre, Northern, Israel. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 September 1297, in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 78, and was buried in Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis de BRIENNE est né environ 1220, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, son père, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Berenguela de León, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de BEAUMONT le 12 février 1253, à Acre, Northern, Israël. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1297, à Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis de BRIENNE um 1220 in Acre, Northern, Palästina geboren wurde, war sein Vater King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I 53 und seine Mutter Berenguela de León 17. Er hat am 12. Februar 1253 in Acre, Northern, Israel Agnès de BEAUMONT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1297 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de BRIENNE è nato il circa 1220 nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, il suo padre, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Berenguela de León, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de BEAUMONT il 12 febbraio 1253, nel Acre, Northern, Israele. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1297, nel Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis de BRIENNEが約1220年にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで生まれた時，父King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne Iは53歳，母Berenguela de Leónは17歳であった。1253年2月12日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹでAgnès de BEAUMONTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年9月1日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスビーウモント-スル-サルスで78歳で死去し，フランスアクイティアインギロンドマウブイソンにて埋葬された。

ko.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 보몽-수-사르테

ko.lifeSummary: Louis de BRIENNE(이)가 대략 1220년 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Berenguela de León(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1253년 2월 12일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 Agnès de BEAUMONT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 9월 1일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 보몽-수-사르테에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 모버이슨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de BRIENNE nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, seu pai, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Berenguela de León, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de BEAUMONT em 12 de fevereiro de 1253, em Acre, Northern, Israel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1297, em Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis de BRIENNE родился около 1220 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина, его отцу по имени King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Berenguela de León, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de BEAUMONT 12 февраля 1253 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1297 г. в местности бомонт-сур-сарт, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности маубуиссон, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis de BRIENNE nació aproximadamente 1220, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, su papá, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Berenguela de León, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Agnès de BEAUMONT el 12 de febrero de 1253, en Acre, Northern, Israel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1297, en Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia.
